name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady Dior Four-Compartment Embroidery Full Rhinestone Grey, lined with sheep tendon, meticulously crafted from satin material, sapphire full rhinestone beaded embroidery, paired with matching tone gloss cowhide handle, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Adorned with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium style, with detachable chain strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps at will. Dimensions: 20 x 16.5 x 8cm
